race.comment: ADAMANA (2) found the line nicely to grab third last time out over 1400m here. Yet to strike over the mile but her recent splits suggest she will relish it this time. LADY LILIBET (6) finished third at Warren two runs back but didn't measure up last time over this trip at Coonabarabran. It doesn't get any easier but on her best form can threaten and JPH's booking is a good push. AVIGNON (3) continues to leave herself with too much to do but did manage to make some late inroads last time and should appreciate the extra 200m. SONNIG (10) is yet to threaten but has fitness on his side and finds a thinner contest. In the mix on her best form.
